nodes.x: A Song of degrees of David. I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of the LORD.
PSALM CXXT.. David prayeth for the peace of. Jerusalem... A Song of degrees of David. ~ WAS. glad when they said. unto me, Let. us go. into the house of. the Lord...
Our feet shall stand within thy gates, O Jerusalem.
And the gates of Jerusalem shall utter hymns of gladness And all her houses shall say, Halleluiah.
Jerusalem is builded as a city that is compact together:
And Kain knew his wife, and she conceived and bare Hanok; and he builded a city, and called the name of the city after the name of his son, Hanok.
Each one builded according to his own grade.
Whither the tribes go up, the tribes of the LORD, unto the testimony of Israel, to give thanks unto the name of the LORD.

4. And now I, the Lord, give unto you a testimony of the truth of
 these commandments which are lying before you;
4 And now I, the Lord, give unto you a testimony of the truth of these commandments which are lying before you.
For there are set thrones of judgment, the thrones of the house of David.
Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee.
Peace be within thy walls, [and] prosperity within thy palaces.
For my brethren and companions' sakes, I will now say, Peace [be] within thee.
Because of the house of the LORD our God I will seek thy good.
